name: cocal-campo
description: Cocal Campo — PWA offline-first + documentação viva

scripts.validate: npm run validate:project && npm run validate:docs
scripts.dev:logs: docker compose --profile stack logs -f api frontend
scripts.test: docker compose up -d postgres && docker compose --profile stack run --rm api go test ./... && docker compose --profile stack run --rm --no-deps frontend npm test
scripts.test:backend: docker compose --profile stack run --rm --no-deps api go test ./...
scripts.test:frontend: docker compose --profile stack run --rm --no-deps frontend npm test
scripts.build: docker compose --profile stack run --rm --no-deps frontend npm run build && docker compose --profile stack run --rm --no-deps api go build -o /tmp/api ./cmd/api
